hypothesis: Incorporating 3D pharmacophore descriptors that encode inter-feature distances and orientations into the reinforcement-learning reward (replacing the CATS-based term) will produce generated compounds that have significantly improved docking scores against ERα (PDB 8AWG) while maintaining ≥80% novelty (absence from ChEMBL/ZINC/PubChem) and no greater than a 10% increase in mean MAP4 similarity to the reference set compared with the original CATS-based setup.
